findings.name: Use of Hard-coded Password
findings.description: The product contains a hard-coded password, which it uses for its own inbound authentication or for outbound communication to external components.
findings.evidence: src/main/resources/application.properties - spring.datasource.password=photoalbum; application-docker.properties - spring.datasource.password=photoalbum; docker-compose.yml - ORACLE_PASSWORD=photoalbum, APP_USER_PASSWORD=photoalbum, SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=photoalbum

findings.name: Incorrect Calculation
findings.description: The product performs a calculation that generates incorrect or unintended results that are later used in security-critical decisions or resource management.
findings.evidence: PhotoServiceImpl.java:94 - maxFileSizeBytes / 1024 / 1024 uses integer division without ensuring proper precision in file size formatting

findings.name: Insufficient Logging
findings.description: When a security-critical event occurs, the product either does not record the event or omits important details about the event when logging it.
findings.evidence: No logging of security-critical events (authentication failures, access control violations, unauthorized access attempts) detected across all controllers and services

findings.name: Use of Hard-coded Credentials
findings.description: The product contains hard-coded credentials, such as a password or cryptographic key.
findings.evidence: application.properties - spring.datasource.password=photoalbum; application-docker.properties - spring.datasource.password=photoalbum; docker-compose.yml - ORACLE_PASSWORD=photoalbum, APP_USER_PASSWORD=photoalbum, SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=photoalbum
